description_long: This object is a rectangular laptop with a light gray chassis and a large, flat display. The screen is open and displays pixelated green text on a dark background, reminiscent of a terminal or code editor. The keyboard is full-sized, featuring a standard layout with rectangular keys and a large trackpad below the spacebar. The exterior surfaces, including the lid and palm rest, are uniformly light gray with minimal visible branding or decoration. The laptop appears to be constructed from plastic or metal, with a matte finish that reduces glare. No visible ports, stickers, or logos are present on the sides or lid.
description: A light gray laptop with a pixelated green-on-black screen, standard keyboard, and large trackpad, featuring a matte finish and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with green pixelated text, full keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and open screen, with the keyboard and trackpad visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed lid, showing a rectangular, pixelated area in the center and no visible branding.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open screen, keyboard, and trackpad.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying pixelated green text on a dark background.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with standard keys and a large trackpad; no numeric keypad or special keys are distinctly visible.
